title: Living Conductors
text: The walls carry the storm into every shield. Dungeon Score +1.
lose: Subtract 1 from your next battle roll.

title: Eye of the Maw
text: A still pocket opens inside the thunder. No score change.
win: Move 1 extra space after claiming the Power.

title: Sky Splinter
text: A spear of lightning pins the battlefield. Dungeon Score +2.
win: Gain 1 Mastery as well as Lightning Storm.
lose: Discard 1 committed troop and draw 1 Curse.

title: Fading Rumble
text: The storm is retreating beyond the peak. Dungeon Score -1.
win: Claim Lightning Storm and reroll your next failed Gate roll.
